commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs contributor proof, rebase/adaptation to the current shared visibility layer, and maintainer review of the access-boundary semantics before any automated repair path is useful.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete session-visibility boundary concern, with no supply-chain changes found.; Review finding: [P1] Limit current aliases to the actual requester — src/agents/tools/sessions-access.ts:76... (sha=643f88a96a0c630743a7df3cc637c3eba03cbaf1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a current-session alias set to session visibility checks, wires it through `sessions_list`, `sessions_history`, and `sessions_send`, and adds regression tests.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +33. Total +44 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main resolves direct key actions through `createSessionVisibilityGuard`, which only recognizes the exact requester key or `current`, so alias targets like `main` remain outside self/tree for non-main requesters. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor proof, rebase/adaptation to the current shared visibility layer, and maintainer review of the access-boundary semantics before any automated repair path is useful.

target.title: Fix current session visibility aliases
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat configured current-session aliases as current for session visibility checks
- Pass current-session aliases through sessions_list, sessions_history, and sessions_send
- Add regression coverage for self/tree visibility alias handling

## Verification
- pnpm exec vitest run src/agents/tools/sessions-access.test.ts --config vitest.unit.config.ts
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/agents/tools/sessions-access.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-history-tool.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-list-tool.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-send-tool.ts src/agents/tools/sessions-access.test.ts
- pnpm tsgo
target.author: bemsas
